name: AI Support Ticket Classifier and Auto-Reply Agent using Claude and Gmail

parameters.content:
## AI Support Ticket Classifier and Auto-Reply Agent

Automates first-response to customer support emails. Claude classifies every ticket, drafts a reply, and routes based on urgency.

### How it works

1. Gmail Trigger polls your inbox every minute for new unread emails.
2. Configure Settings holds all user-editable values in one place.
3. Build Prompt formats the email subject, sender, and body into a structured Claude instruction.
4. Classify with Claude returns category, priority, sentiment, a summary, a draft reply, and an internal note.
5. Parse Output extracts those fields and adds a timestamp.
6. Route by Priority branches urgent tickets to a Gmail draft and Slack alert, sends auto-replies to normal tickets, and logs low tickets without replying.
7. Every branch ends with a Google Sheets log row for full reporting.

### Setup steps

- [x] **Gmail credentials** - Connect your Google account in the Gmail Trigger and both Gmail action nodes.
- [ ] **Anthropic credentials** - Add your Anthropic API key to the Claude Sonnet Model node.
- [ ] **Slack credentials** - Connect your Slack workspace in the Alert Support Team node.
- [ ] **Google Sheets credentials** - Connect your Google account in all three log nodes.
- [ ] **Sheet ID** - Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID in Configure Settings.
- [ ] **Slack channel** - Replace YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID in Configure Settings.
- [ ] **Support email** - Replace YOUR_SUPPORT_EMAIL in Configure Settings.
- [ ] **Activate** - Turn the workflow on when all credentials are saved.

### Customization

Edit the categories list in Build Prompt to match your industry. Adjust MAX_EMAIL_CHARS in Configure Settings to control how much of the email body Claude reads.

## Inbox trigger and settings

Gmail polls for new unread emails once per minute. Configure Settings holds every value the user needs to edit so no other node requires changes.

## Claude AI analysis

Build Prompt assembles the email into a structured instruction. Claude returns a JSON object with category, priority, sentiment, summary, draft reply, and internal note. Parse Output extracts those fields for routing.

## Priority routing

Urgent tickets create a Gmail draft and fire a Slack alert so your team can review and send. Normal tickets get an auto-reply immediately. Low-priority tickets are logged only. All three branches end at Google Sheets.
